message:
fix: set image detail based on model capability

GPT-5.4+ supports detail:"original" for full-fidelity image input
(up to 10.24M pixels). Older models fall back to "high". Applied to
both tool result images and user message images where detail isn't
explicitly set.

Without this, images were sent with no detail parameter (defaults to
"auto"), which gave insufficient resolution for spatial tasks like
chess piece identification — the model couldn't distinguish piece
shapes and fell into unbounded PIL code analysis loops.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
